programme.title: Exeter City vs Bradford City - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - League One 2025/2026
programme.desc: Live and exclusive action from the EFL (English Football League) One. EFL One is the third-tier in the English football league system. At the end of each season three teams are promoted to the EFL Championship and the four clubs that finished at the bottom of EFL League One are relegated to EFL League Two. The season runs from 8 August 2025 until 2 May 2026.

programme.title: Barcelona vs Bayern Munich - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Semi-Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.title: Day 1 - Longines Global Champions Tour – Miami Beach Round 2026
programme.desc: The Longines Global Champions Tour Miami Beach 2026 brings elite show jumping to a spectacular seaside setting, with the world’s top riders and horses competing across multiple classes. The highlight is the Grand Prix, where precision, speed and technique are key. Set against the iconic Miami skyline, the event combines top-level sport with a unique atmosphere on one of the Tour’s most distinctive stages.

programme.title: Longines Global Champions Tour - Shanghai Jumping - Round 1 Competition Team
programme.desc: Held at the Shanghai Juss International Equestrian Centre, featuring CSI5* show jumping with fences up to 1.60m. Technical courses emphasize combinations and time allowed on a compact arena.

programme.title: EN EPL Review 2025/26 | E34
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Atlético Madrid and Arsenal will meet for just the fourth time in European competition, with half of those coming in this season’s UEFA Champions League. The Gunners won 4-0 in a league phase meeting last October, which remains Atlético’s joint-heaviest defeat in the competition. Arsenal and Atlético Madrid are the two teams that have played the most matches in the history of the European Cup/Champions League without ever winning the trophy: 223

programme.title: Chelsea vs Leeds - Emirates FA Cup 2025-26 - Semi Final 2
programme.desc: The Football Association Challenge Cup, more commonly known as the FA Cup, is the oldest national football competition in the world dating back to the 1871-72 season. 736 clubs compete for the chance to lift one of English football's most famous trophies. All the best matches are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are unbeaten in their last four home games against Aston Villa, all in the Premier League, drawing 1-1 earlier this month at the City Ground. Villa last won there in March 2019 in the Championship under Dean Smith. This is the first major European semi-final between two English teams since the 2008-09 UEFA Champions League between Arsenal and Man Utd, won 4-1 by the Red Devils on aggregate.

programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are unbeaten in their last four home games against Aston Villa, all in the Premier League, drawing 1-1 earlier this month at the City Ground. programme.title: Sporting Braga vs Freiburg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the first ever European meeting between Braga and Freiburg – the Portuguese side have won five out of 13 major European games against German teams, though all five have been in group stage matches; they are winless and goalless in four games in the knockout stages. Freiburg’s only previous European encounter with a Portuguese club came in the 2013-14 UEFA Europa League group stage, drawing 1-1 at home and 0-0 away against Estoril Praia.

programme.title: Leeds United vs Burnley - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Leeds lost 1-0 at home to Burnley in the Championship last season, but have never lost consecutive home league games against the Clarets before. Burnley are looking to complete just their third ever league double over Leeds United, after 1926-27 and 2013-14.

programme.title: EN EPL The Big Interview 2025/26 | E38 - Tammy Abraham
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest names.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Fulham - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Arsenal have never lost in 32 home league games against Fulham, the most any side has faced another without defeat in English Football League history. Fulham have won just one of their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, a 2-1 home win in December 2023.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: EN EPL The Art Of.. | E1 - The Centre-Back
Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Aston Villa won this exact fixture 2-0 last season, last beating Tottenham Hotspur in consecutive home league games in May/November 2004. Tottenham Hotspur have lost six of their last 10 Premier League games against Aston Villa, more than they had in their previous 34 against the Villans.

programme.title: Everton vs Manchester City - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Everton have lost their last eight home league games against Manchester City, their longest run of consecutive defeats against an opponent in their history. Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 17 Premier League games against Everton, since a 4-0 loss in January 2017.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Aston Villa won this exact fixture 2-0 last season, last beating Tottenham Hotspur in consecutive home league games in May/November 2004. Tottenham Hotspur have lost six of their last 10 Premier League games against Aston Villa, more than they had in their previous 34 against the Villans.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Stories From The Cities | E13 Monterrey
programme.desc: 16-Episode Series offering a cinematic exploration of the "soccer soul" of each FIFA World Cup 2026 host city. Uncover the cultural, grassroots, and community dimensions of football across North America.

programme.desc: A weekly Magazine that provides unique access inside the Paris Saint Germain world.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Sinals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Paris SG have won only one of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lorient. Following their 1-1 draw at the Moustoir on 29 October, PSG could endure their first winless season against FCL since 2010-11. Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Paris SG have won only one of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lorient. Following their 1-1 draw at the Moustoir on 29 October, PSG could endure their first winless season against FCL since 2010-11. Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Fulham - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Arsenal have never lost in 32 home league games against Fulham, the most any side has faced another without defeat in English Football League history. Fulham have won just one of their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, a 2-1 home win in December 2023.

programme.title: Osasuna vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: Osasuna have won only one of their last 11 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona and are currently on their longest ever run without a clean sheet against the Blaugrana in the competition. Barcelona lost their last LaLiga away game against Osasuna 4-2 in September 2024, ending an eight-game unbeaten run on the road against them ; they have not lost consecutive away league matches against the Navarrese side since 1984.

Sporting Braga vs Freiburg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the first ever European meeting between Braga and Freiburg – the Portuguese side have won five out of 13 major European games against German teams, though all five have been in group stage matches; they are winless and goalless in four games in the knockout stages. Freiburg’s only previous European encounter with a Portuguese club came in the 2013-14 UEFA Europa League group stage, drawing 1-1 at home and 0-0 away against Estoril Praia.

programme.desc: The world’s largest martial arts organization returns to Bangkok on March 13 with another explosive night at Lumpinee Stadium. programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. programme.title: One Friday Fights -148
programme.desc: ONE Friday Fights 148 brings another stacked night of Muay Thai, kickboxing, and MMA action from Bangkok. In the main event, a Rajadamnern Stadium World Champion returns for a record 17th appearance on the series, facing Mehrdad Khanzadeh after his dramatic comeback win last time out. Also on the card, Denkriangkrai looks to extend his four-fight streak against Moldovan puncher Valerii Strungari, plus more top matchups.

programme.title: Sevilla vs Real Sociedad - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: Sevilla have lost five of their last seven LaLiga matches against Real Sociedad, having suffered no defeats in their previous nine top-flight meetings. Following their 0-2 win in their last LaLiga visit to the Ramón Sánchez-Pizjuán in November 2024, Real Sociedad are looking to win consecutive away league games against Sevilla for only the third time in their history, and the first since December 2002.

programme.title: One Friday Fights -149

In the main event, Tomyamkoong looks to build on his dramatic bonus-winning victory against Bejenuta Maximus, who arrives after impressing in Europe. In the co-main event, Isannuea puts his perfect knockout record on the line against the unbeaten Khunpon, plus more explosive matchups.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Atlético Madrid and Arsenal will meet for just the fourth time in European competition, with half of those coming in this season’s UEFA Champions League. The Gunners won 4-0 in a league phase meeting last October, which remains Atlético’s joint-heaviest defeat in the competition. Arsenal and Atlético Madrid are the two teams that have played the most matches in the history of the European Cup/Champions League without ever winning the trophy: 223

programme.title: UEL/UECL Magazine 2025/2026 - UEL MD15 Preview + UECL MD13 Preview

programme.title: Nottingham Forest vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest are unbeaten in their last four home games against Aston Villa, all in the Premier League, drawing 1-1 earlier this month at the City Ground. Villa last won there in March 2019 in the Championship under Dean Smith. This is the first major European semi-final between two English teams since the 2008-09 UEFA Champions League between Arsenal and Man Utd, won 4-1 by the Red Devils on aggregate.

programme.title: Sporting Braga vs Freiburg - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 1st leg
programme.desc: This is the first ever European meeting between Braga and Freiburg – the Portuguese side have won five out of 13 major European games against German teams, though all five have been in group stage matches; they are winless and goalless in four games in the knockout stages. Freiburg’s only previous European encounter with a Portuguese club came in the 2013-14 UEFA Europa League group stage, drawing 1-1 at home and 0-0 away against Estoril Praia.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Bayern München - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Paris SG and Bayern Munich have faced each other 15 times in the UEFA Champions League, and nine times across the last nine campaigns. Since the start of the 2017-18 edition, only Real Madrid v Manchester City has been played more times in the competition than this fixture. Bayern Munich have won each of their last five games against Paris SG in the UEFA Champions League, including one earlier this season. This is already the longest winning streak a team has achieved against Paris SG in major European competition.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals -1st leg
programme.desc: Atlético Madrid and Arsenal will meet for just the fourth time in European competition, with half of those coming in this season’s UEFA Champions League. The Gunners won 4-0 in a league phase meeting last October, which remains Atlético’s joint-heaviest defeat in the competition. Arsenal and Atlético Madrid are the two teams that have played the most matches in the history of the European Cup/Champions League without ever winning the trophy: 223 and 190 respectively.

programme.title: Brentford vs West Ham United - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Brentford have won three of their four Premier League home games against West Ham, with the only exception being a 1-1 draw last season. programme.title: Arsenal vs Fulham - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Arsenal have never lost in 32 home league games against Fulham, the most any side has faced another without defeat in English Football League history. Fulham have won just one of their last 15 Premier League games against Arsenal, a 2-1 home win in December 2023.

programme.title: Osasuna vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: Osasuna have won only one of their last 11 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona and are currently on their longest ever run without a clean sheet against the Blaugrana in the competition. Barcelona lost their last LaLiga away game against Osasuna 4-2 in September 2024, ending an eight-game unbeaten run on the road against them ; they have not lost consecutive away league matches against the Navarrese side since 1984.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Paris SG have won only one of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lorient. Following their 1-1 draw at the Moustoir on 29 October, PSG could endure their first winless season against FCL since 2010-11. Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Paris SG have won only one of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lorient. Following their 1-1 draw at the Moustoir on 29 October, PSG could endure their first winless season against FCL since 2010-11. Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.

programme.title: Espanyol vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: RCD Espanyol have won three of their last six home games against Real Madrid in LaLiga, as many victories as in their previous 15 such meetings in the top flight. Real Madrid have won 109 of their 179 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, the record for the most wins by one team against another in the history of the competition.

programme.title: Osasuna vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: Osasuna have won only one of their last 11 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona and are currently on their longest ever run without a clean sheet against the Blaugrana in the competition. Barcelona lost their last LaLiga away game against Osasuna 4-2 in September 2024, ending an eight-game unbeaten run on the road against them ; they have not lost consecutive away league matches against the Navarrese side since 1984.

programme.title: Manchester United vs. Brentford - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost their last two league games against Brentford, more than they had in their previous 11. Brentford are looking to complete the league double over Manchester United for just the second time, previously doing so in the 1936-37 top-flight campaign that saw the Red Devils relegated.

programme.title: Arsenal vs. Newcastle United - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Following their 2-1 win at St James’ Park in September, Arsenal are looking to complete the league double over Newcastle for the first time since 2020-21. Newcastle are winless in their last 13 Premier League away games against Arsenal, and have scored just one goal in their last nine visits to the Emirates Stadium.

programme.title: Manchester City vs. Arsenal - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini. Arsenal are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost 12 in a row against them before this.

programme.title: Nantes vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Nantes have won only one of their last 11 Ligue 1 games against Marseille, but that was the most recent one on 4th January away from home. The last time FCN managed two consecutive wins against OM was in 2018-19 - 3-2 at the Beaujoire and then 2-1 at the Vélodrome. Nantes are currently on a six-game winless streak at home against Marseille in Ligue 1, and could equal their longest winless run against this opponent, dating back to September 1988-April 1997. Only Paris SG have beaten Nantes more times at home than OM.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Paris SG have won only one of their last four Ligue 1 matches against Lorient. Following their 1-1 draw at the Moustoir on 29 October, PSG could endure their first winless season against FCL since 2010-11. Lorient are unbeaten in their last two Ligue 1 away games against Paris SG. Among current top-flight clubs, only Monaco have a higher away win percentage against PSG than FCL.

programme.title: Nice vs Lens - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Nice have won eight of their last 12 Ligue 1 matches against Lens, as many as they managed in their previous 37 meetings. programme.title: Paris FC vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Paris FC have won only one of their nine matches against Brest in all competitions in the 21st century, though that victory came in their most recent meeting last September, which was the only previous Ligue 1 encounter between the two sides. Brest have won their last three Ligue 1 matches against newly promoted teams, having failed to win any of the previous three.

programme.title: Strasbourg vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: The Ligue 1 head-to-head record between Strasbourg and Toulouse is perfectly balanced, with 28 wins each and 19 draws. Following their 1-0 defeat at the Stadium on 6 December, RCSA are looking to avoid consecutive league defeats against TFC for the first time since a three-game streak between August 2004 and September 2005. Strasbourg have won three of their last four Ligue 1 matches, as many as in their previous 14.

programme.desc: Auxerre have won only 11% of their matches against Angers in Ligue 1, their lowest percentage of wins against a team they have faced more than twice. Auxerre have 25 points after 31 Ligue 1 2025-26 matches, their lowest total at this stage of a L1 season in their history.

programme.title: Paris FC vs Brest - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Paris FC have won only one of their nine matches against Brest in all competitions in the 21st century, though that victory came in their most recent meeting last September, which was the only previous Ligue 1 encounter between the two sides. Brest have won their last three Ligue 1 matches against newly promoted teams, having failed to win any of the previous three.

programme.title: The last Dante
programme.desc: At 42 years old, the Brazilian players of Nice, Dante, is playing his last season of his career. For his last season as professional, he opens the door to follow him and remember his best moments

programme.title: Wrexham vs Middlesbrough - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - Championship 2025/2026
programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage only on beIN of the 2025–2026 EFL Championship. The EFL Championship is the second tier in the English Football league system. The season will run from 8 August 2025 until 2 May 2026.

programme.title: EPL The Big Interview 2025/2026
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal ‘out and about’ interviews with the Premier League’s biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: Strasbourg vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: The Ligue 1 head-to-head record between Strasbourg and Toulouse is perfectly balanced, with 28 wins each and 19 draws. Following their 1-0 defeat at the Stadium on 6 December, RCSA are looking to avoid consecutive league defeats against TFC for the first time since a three-game streak between August 2004 and September 2005. Strasbourg have won three of their last four Ligue 1 matches, as many as in their previous 14.

programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Rennes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: None of the last 10 Ligue 1 meetings between Lyon and Rennes have ended in a draw, with those 10 encounters producing a total of 39 goals, an average of 3.9 per match. Lyon have recorded 17 wins after 31 matches in the Ligue 1 this season, their highest tally at this stage since 2020-21.

programme.title: The last Dante
programme.desc: The fight goes on for OGC Nice and Dante from training sessions to the pitch and inside the locker room. Competing on all fronts, the club is fully engaged in both Ligue 1 and the “Coupe de France”. A meeting with fighters Manon Fleurot to discuss the challenges and battles ahead.

programme.title: Basaksehir vs Kasimpasa - Turkish Super League - MD 31 - 2025-2026
programme.desc: The Turkish Süper Lig is the top-flight competition of the Turkish football league system and is live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS. The season runs from August to May, with each club playing 38 matches. Matches are played Friday through to Monday. Galatasaray are the current Champions.

programme.title: Valencia vs Girona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 32
programme.desc: Valencia CF have won only one of their last six LaLiga matches against Girona – a 2-0 victory in September 2024 – having won four of their first five meetings in the competition. Girona FC have not drawn any of their five away LaLiga matches against Valencia, their most away games against any opponent in the top flight without a single draw.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Sunderland - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Wolves are unbeaten in their last seven home league games against Sunderland. This is the first time they’ve hosted them since a 0-0 draw in the Championship in December 2017, and first time in the Premier League since December 2011. Sunderland have won their last two league games against Wolves. They’re looking to complete the double over them for the first time since 1949-50, while they last won three in a row against them in March 1937.

programme.title: Nantes vs Olympique Marseille - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: Nantes have won only one of their last 11 Ligue 1 games against Marseille, but that was the most recent one on 4th January away from home. The last time FCN managed two consecutive wins against OM was in 2018-19 - 3-2 at the Beaujoire and then 2-1 at the Vélodrome. Nantes are currently on a six-game winless streak at home against Marseille in Ligue 1, and could equal their longest winless run against this opponent, dating back to September 1988-April 1997. Only Paris SG have beaten Nantes more times at home than OM.

programme.title: Strasbourg vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: The Ligue 1 head-to-head record between Strasbourg and Toulouse is perfectly balanced, with 28 wins each and 19 draws. Following their 1-0 defeat at the Stadium on 6 December, RCSA are looking to avoid consecutive league defeats against TFC for the first time since a three-game streak between August 2004 and September 2005. Strasbourg have won three of their last four Ligue 1 matches, as many as in their previous 14.

programme.title: Nîmes vs Toulouse - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: OL Lyonnes vs Arsenal - UEFA Women’s Champions League 2025/2026 - Semi-Finals
programme.desc: The 2025/2026 UEFA Women's Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. This is the first season under a new format, which have 18 participating teams, playing six games each against different opponents in a league phase, all in a joint group. The teams are competing for a place in the final that will be played at the Ullevaal Stadion in Oslo, Norway on May 2026. Barcelona are the current Champions.

programme.title: Flavio Cobolli ( ITA ) vs Ben Shelton ( USA ) - Singles Final - Day 7 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda
programme.desc: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.

programme.title: Trabzon vs Gotzepe - Turkish Super League - MD 32 - 2025-2026
programme.desc: The Turkish Süper Lig is the top-flight competition of the Turkish football league system and is live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS. programme.title: Toulouse vs Tremblay - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Race 1 - Red Bull Ring Round - Formula Regional European Championship 2026
programme.desc: Event at the Red Bull Ring (4.318 km, 10 turns) in Spielberg, Austria. The Formula Regional European Championship runs two races per weekend, each approx. 30 minutes + 1 lap. programme.title: Qualifying - MotoGP Spain 2026
programme.desc: The MotoGP paddock arrives at Jerez for the Spanish Grand Prix, where MotoGP, Moto2 and Moto3 come together at one of the sport’s most iconic and atmospheric tracks. Famous for its passionate crowd and technical layout, Jerez is a circuit that rewards precision, balance, and confidence, setting the stage for intense racing throughout the weekend in all three categories.

programme.title: Al Gharafa vs Al Shahania - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W22
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Montpellier vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Madrid Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.

programme.title: Limoges vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. programme.title: Madrid Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.title: Universidad Central (VEN) vs Independiente del Valle (ECU) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage -
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.
